content.en:
"Endless Dao Ancestor, this is it, the life level tests are all public, you can see the life levels of other Dao Ancestors here! "

The Sevenfold Ancestor said.

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Although it will be tested twice, some of which involve their own secrets, those half-step sevenfold ancestors are willing to enter the Ancient River of Life.

After all, the ancient river of life can raise the level of life, who wouldn't want to!

This is a fortitude! The outside world simply can't get it.

Soon, Ye Tian entered the interior of a primordial antiquity.

This primordial artifact is called the Cave Void Mirror, which can peek into the life level of the Dao Ancestor, and the accuracy is incomparably high, even if it is hidden, it is useless.

Airplanes!!!!

The Cave Void Mirror began to detect Ye Tian's life level, and soon a piece of data appeared on the Cave Void Mirror, and this data was also known by other Dao Ancestors.

“5.3！"

Seeing this data, the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor who was in charge of the test was shocked!!!

If Ye Tian came out of the Ancient River of Life and had this level of life, although he was shocked, he would not feel outrageous.

But now, Ye Tian has not yet entered the ancient river of life, and he actually has a 5.3 life level.

You must know that the other half-step Sevenfold Ancestors, even if they comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao, their life level is only a little more than 4 at most.

"5.3 life level!"

Ye Tian was not surprised at all by this life level.

His foundation is too strong, if the life level is only more than 4 points, then it would be strange!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took a look at the life levels of the other half-step sevenfold ancestors, most of them were more than 3 points, and some reached more than 4 points, but the number was scarce.

As for reaching the life level of more than 5 points, there are also some, but it is the second test that came out of the ancient river of life.

For example, a half-step sevenfold ancestor called Chenxu Dao Ancestor, the first test was 4.6 life level, and after coming out of the life ancient river, the life level reached 5.2, which increased by a full 0.6 life level, which is definitely a huge improvement!

"Hey, Canggu Dao Ancestor's life level is 4.2!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly, this Canggu Dao Ancestor was an unrivaled existence for him at the beginning, but now when he looks at it, it is just so-so!

Now, he could easily defeat or even kill Canggu Dao Ancestor.

"Now, my first test has reached the life level of 5.3, and other Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao will be extremely shocked when they see it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This time, he's going to be famous!

......

Soon, Ye Tian tested the life level for the first time, reaching the demon level of 5.3, and it spread directly in the No. 3 Ancient Nest.

And Canggu Dao Ancestor naturally received the news.

"What, that ant of the Endless Dao Ancestor actually has a 5.3 life level, how is this possible?"

Canggu Daozu was shocked.

At the beginning of the 13 Ancient Nest, he easily blew up Ye Tian, if it weren't for Ye Tian's difficulty in killing, his life-saving ability was too strong, plus he still needed to fight for the Primordial Reincarnation Stone, otherwise he would definitely be able to kill Ye Tian.

Now, Ye Tian's life level has reached 5.3!

"He is also a half-step sevenfold ancestor, and he shouldn't have broken many boundaries, even if he breaks a lot of boundaries, his life level won't increase much. This guy of the Endless Dao Ancestor must have refined a supreme treasure that can increase the level of life, similar to the Ancient River of Life! In this way, even if he enters the Ancient River of Life, the level of life he will not be raised much, maybe he can only improve to the level of 5.4 or 5.5. "Canggu Dao Ancestor secretly said.

But he was still very unhappy, after all, even if Ye Tian didn't advance an inch, it would be difficult for him to catch up with Ye Tian at his life level!

His current life level is only 4.2, and when he enters the Life Guhe cultivation, he can only improve to the level of 4.8 or 4.9 at best, which is already the best result!

"Hmph, the high level of life only makes the combat effectiveness higher, how long has it been, how many times can the Endless Dao Ancestor break the boundary? at most sixty times, and I have already broken the seventy-two boundary, my strength must be far superior to him!" Canggu Dao Ancestor comforted himself.

......

No. 3 Ancient Nest, Ancient River of Life.

It's calm, and there's not a ripple on the white river.

Soon, a half-step sevenfold ancestor came here.

And Ye Tian also came here.

At this time, he subconsciously used his copying talent to probe around.

"Hey, there's even a Sevenfold Ancestor hidden here!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, but he didn't reveal the other party.

However, this Sevenfold Origin Ancestor is indeed very deeply hidden, and on the outside, it does only look like a half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor cultivation.

However, the opponent's strength is afraid that it has reached the realm of the middle or even late stage of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

Moreover, the identity of the other party is afraid that it is also fake.

Abrupt.

A ray of light directly locked onto the Sevenfold Ancestor.

Rumble!!!

The other party's disguise was directly broken, revealing his true face.

"Dare to disguise, look for death!"

A half-step Yae Ancestor appeared and shot directly.

"No!"

The Sevenfold Ancestor trembled, completely unaware that his disguise had been discovered.

He tried to escape, but he couldn't move.

Click!

Under one blow, this Sevenfold Origin Ancestor was killed in an instant.

"Go in!"

The half-step Yae Ancestor said.

......

These half-step sevenfold ancestors were not affected by what had just happened, and they entered the ancient river of life one by one.

"Sure enough, it's a primordial antiquity!"

Ye Tian used his copying talent to confirm that this Life Ancient River was indeed an Primordial Antiquity, although it was incredible, but this was the truth.

Moreover, the Ancient River of Life actually has a special Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment - Life Absorption!

"Copy!"

Ye Tian copied the Life Absorbing Ancestor Endowment, and then spent a little time fusing it.

After the fusion, Ye Tian understood the usefulness of life absorption.

"I'll go, if I use life to absorb it, I can absorb the energy of the ancient river of life, anyway, the ancient river of life continues to absorb the special energy of matter from the void and turn it into itself, and although my life absorption is not as magical as it, it can allow me to quickly absorb the life energy contained in it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he urged the life to absorb and absorb the energy of the ancient river of life.

Airplanes!!!!

Countless energies poured into Ye Tian's body, refining his body and elevating his life level.

The ascension is slow, but it is perceptible.

"The energy of the Ancient River of Life is too special, this kind of energy that can improve the life level of Dao Ancestor, this is the first time I have encountered it!"

Ye Tian was very excited, and he continued to absorb and quickly improve his life level.
